examples: Life goes on, but it goes on so much better with hope and renewal and recommitment.
The couple held a fifty thousand dollar recommitment ceremony in 2005 to prove that they were still in love.
Moreover, the transformation of self-concept in the course of recovery could have an effect on the prevention of recommitment.
He suggests a recommitment by the nuclear powers not to test their weapons--there have been no nuclear tests since 1996--in exchange for a commitment by all nations to stop enriching uranium.
And we need a recommitment from our teams.
